query: UPDATE transactions SET transaction_status = 'COMPLETED', endTime = NOW(), stopReason = 'SYSTEM_CLEANUP' WHERE transaction_status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND startTime < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
